data.title: Australia's Natural Gas Shortage Delayed by Improved Battery Technology and Grid Investment
data.description: Australia's anticipated natural gas shortage has been postponed by a year due to advancements in battery technology and increased investment in the main electricity grid. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how these developments have contributed to stabilizing the energy supply. The improvements in battery efficiency and the strengthening of the grid infrastructure have played a crucial role in mitigating the immediate risks associated with the natural gas supply. This delay provides Australia with more time to address potential shortages and explore sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Codex App to Continue Development, Project Lead Says
data.description: OpenAI's Codex project lead has confirmed that the Codex App will remain in development. According to Jin10, the team is dedicating more resources than ever to enhance the application. The project lead expressed confidence that the app will soon achieve significant improvements.

data.title: China's SMEs Face Challenges Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran is significantly impacting the prospects of numerous small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in China. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that despite these challenges, Beijing is striving to maintain a composed demeanor as it prepares for an upcoming summit between Chinese President Xi Jinping and U.S. President Donald Trump. The meeting is expected to address various geopolitical and economic issues, with the Iran situation likely to be a key topic of discussion. As tensions continue to influence global markets, China's SMEs are navigating an increasingly complex landscape.

data.title: Solana's Meteora Launches DLMM Feature for Enhanced Liquidity Analysis
data.description: On March 26, Solana's liquidity protocol Meteora announced the launch of its chart-based DLMM range setting feature. According to BlockBeats, this new functionality allows users to identify support and resistance levels and precisely view liquidity positions on charts. The update aims to enhance the analytical capabilities for traders within the Solana ecosystem.

data.title: Reflection Seeks $2.5 Billion Funding to Reach $25 Billion Valuation
data.description: Reflection, a startup backed by Nvidia, is in discussions to secure $2.5 billion in funding. According to ChainCatcher, this financing round aims to elevate the company's valuation to $25 billion.

data.title: Energy Shock: Trump Predicts Short-Term Impact, CEOs Warn of Long-Term Challenges
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has downplayed the potential long-term effects of the current energy shock, suggesting it will be short-lived. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that while Trump remains optimistic, several CEOs have expressed concerns about the prolonged impact on the energy sector. These industry leaders warn that the disruptions could lead to extended challenges, affecting supply chains and market stability. The differing perspectives highlight the uncertainty surrounding the energy market's future, with potential implications for global economies.

data.title: Thailand Experiences Overnight Fuel Price Surge of Up to 22%
data.description:
Fuel prices in Thailand have experienced a significant increase, with costs rising by as much as 22% overnight. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the impact of this sudden surge on consumers and businesses across the country. The price hike is attributed to various factors, including global market fluctuations and domestic supply challenges.

The abrupt increase has sparked concerns among Thai citizens and industry leaders, who are worried about the potential economic repercussions. Analysts suggest that the rise in fuel costs could lead to higher transportation expenses, affecting the overall cost of goods and services.

The Thai government is reportedly considering measures to mitigate the impact on the economy and alleviate the burden on consumers. However, the situation remains fluid, and further developments are expected as authorities assess the situation and explore potential solutions.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Highlights Cryptocurrency Perpetual Futures Trading as Policy Priority
data.description: CFTC Chairman Michael Selig emphasized the importance of reinstating cryptocurrency perpetual futures trading in the United States as a significant element of the agency's innovation policy agenda. According to NS3.AI, Selig's statement underscores the agency's focus on advancing regulatory frameworks to accommodate emerging financial instruments. While the report highlights this as a policy priority, it does not detail any formal actions taken by the CFTC to implement this initiative.

data.title: Hong Kong Biopharmaceutical Stocks Rise Amid Market Volatility
data.description: Hong Kong's biopharmaceutical sector experienced notable gains as several stocks surged amid market fluctuations. According to Jin10, XuanZhu Biopharma-B (02575.HK) saw an increase of over 12%, while Ascletis Pharma (01672.HK) rose by more than 7%. Additionally, Lepu Biopharma (02157.HK) and XtalPi Holdings (02228.HK) both climbed over 6%, and Akeso Biopharma (09926.HK) increased by 5.5%. These movements reflect a positive trend in the biopharmaceutical industry within Hong Kong's stock market.

data.title: Polymarket reports a 54% probability that the Clarity Act will be signed into law in 2026, down 11% in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of the "Clarity Act being signed into law in 2026" event on Polymarket is currently 54%, down 11% in the last 24 hours, with a trading volume of $430,600, due to industry disagreements over the compromise terms of the Clarity Act stablecoin rewards. Coinbase has expressed its dissatisfaction with the latest compromise text to staff of US senators, but has not yet publicly stated its opposition. The proposal was presented to crypto industry stakeholders on Monday, with some expressing dissatisfaction and others saying the outcome was better than expected. During this week's industry conference call, Coinbase disagreed with other parties, with some companies believing that giving up certain stablecoin rewards was too costly, while others believed that losing the bill posed a greater risk to the overall legislative framework of the crypto industry. As a result, Circle's stock price fell 20% on Tuesday, before recovering slightly on Wednesday. White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt stated on the X platform that "everything will be resolved." The final text is expected to be released this weekend or early next week. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: The founder of Distributed Capital is publicly soliciting clues about the theft of $42 million from personal wallets in 2022, offering a 10%-20% bounty.
data.description: Bo Shen, founder of Distributed Capital, announced on the X platform that he is publicly soliciting clues related to the theft of his personal wallet and has established a bounty mechanism. Bo Shen stated that his personal wallet was hacked in November 2022, resulting in a loss of approximately $42 million. For the past three years, his team has been continuously tracking the incident and has now obtained more key clues and evidence, gradually clarifying the on-chain flow path of the stolen assets. This bounty program is open to all individuals and organizations, without restrictions based on identity, background, or form. Anyone who makes a substantial contribution to the recovery of the assets will receive a reward of 10%-20% of the final recovered amount, with the specific percentage determined based on the actual contribution.

data.title: DeFi Projected to Generate $8 Billion in On-Chain Revenue by 2025
data.description:
DeFi is expected to generate approximately $8 billion in on-chain revenue by 2025. According to ChainCatcher, research by Vadym indicates that the largest source of this revenue will be AMM transaction fees, estimated at around $4.2 billion, with Uniswap, Meteora, and Raydium accounting for 62% of this amount. Lending interest ranks second, contributing about $1.76 billion, with platforms like Aave and Morpho making up over 60% of DeFi's total TVL, although nearly half of the lending demand involves circular leverage operations.

Real-world assets (RWA) are projected to contribute between $600 million and $900 million, with U.S. Treasury bonds comprising approximately 41% of the RWA market. Perpetual contract funding rates are expected to add around $300 million, primarily from Ethena. Notably, over half of the stablecoin deposits in the Ethereum ecosystem yield lower returns than U.S. Treasury rates. Potential revenue sources such as insurance underwriting and on-chain options remain underdeveloped.

The analysis highlights Sky (formerly MakerDAO) as an example, noting that about 70% of its income is derived from off-chain assets, reflecting the accelerating flow of traditional finance (TradFi) returns into DeFi through authorized channels.

data.title: U.S. Stocks and Crypto Sector Experience Broad Rebound
data.description:
U.S. stocks closed higher, marking a positive day for the financial markets. According to NS3.AI, the Dow Jones Industrial Average increased by 0.66%, while the S&P 500 gained 0.54%. The Nasdaq Composite also saw an uptick, adding 0.77% to its value.

In the cryptocurrency sector, Solana (HSDT) experienced a notable rise, increasing by 7.46%. This broad rebound in both stocks and cryptocurrencies indicates a renewed investor confidence across these markets.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold and Silver Prices Rise Amid European Stock Decline
data.description: Gold prices increased to $4,534.53 per ounce, marking a 0.61% intraday rise. Silver also saw gains, climbing to $71.389. According to NS3.AI, major European stock indices experienced a slight decline. Additionally, BVIX and EVIX both decreased by approximately 1.6% intraday, while WTI and Brent crude prices showed modest upward movement.

data.title: Large Ethereum Withdrawal from FalconX Raises Speculation
data.description: A new wallet address, 0xA177566863eB86A9699CDA8E6603fb7ab2367dc9, withdrew 50,000 ETH, valued at $108 million, from FalconX four hours ago, analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X. Observers speculate that Bitmine might be behind this transaction, as they have a history of withdrawing Ethereum from FalconX using new addresses. The transaction has attracted attention due to its size and the potential involvement of Bitmine.

data.title: Newrails Launches MiCA-Compliant Euro Stablecoin on Monad
data.description: Newrails, an electronic money institution regulated by the Bank of Lithuania, has announced the launch of a MiCA-compliant euro stablecoin, EURW, on the Monad platform. According to ChainCatcher, Newrails holds dual licenses as a Lithuanian Electronic Money Institution (EMI) and a Czech Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP). Each EURW token is backed 1:1 by euro reserves, allowing token holders to exchange them for fiat euros without fees at any time. The stablecoin aims to provide production-grade infrastructure for Web3 developers, payment developers, and RWA teams.

data.title: Henkel in Advanced Negotiations to Acquire Olaplex Hair-Care Brand
data.description:
Henkel is reportedly in advanced discussions to acquire Olaplex, a hair-care brand known for its popular shampoos and treatments. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the matter, that the German consumer goods company is looking to expand its portfolio with this acquisition. Olaplex has gained a significant following for its innovative hair-care products, which have become a staple in salons and households alike.

The potential acquisition aligns with Henkel's strategy to strengthen its presence in the beauty and personal care sector. Olaplex's unique formulations have contributed to its rapid growth and popularity, making it an attractive target for Henkel. The deal, if finalized, would mark a significant move for Henkel in the competitive hair-care market.

Henkel has been actively pursuing growth opportunities in the beauty industry, and acquiring Olaplex would enhance its product offerings and market reach. The negotiations are ongoing, and further details about the transaction have not been disclosed. Henkel's interest in Olaplex underscores the brand's strong market position and the increasing demand for specialized hair-care solutions.

data.title: Crypto stocks rebounded across the board at the close of trading in the US, with Solana (HSDT) rising more than 7%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.66%, the S&P 500 rose 0.54%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.77%. The crypto sector saw broad gains, with Solana rising 7.46%, Circle rising 2.66%, Strategy (MSTR) rising 2.11%, Bitmine rising 2.12%, SharpLink rising 1.53%, and Coinbase rising 0.03%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Nominee Aims to Reduce Central Bank's Balance Sheet
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair nominee Kevin Warsh has expressed intentions to substantially reduce the U.S. central bank's $6.6 trillion balance sheet. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that achieving this goal may require more than one term, as suggested by a leading financial economist. Warsh's approach reflects a strategic shift in monetary policy, aiming to address concerns over the expansive balance sheet. The economist emphasized the complexity and time required to implement such changes, indicating that Warsh's tenure could be pivotal in shaping the future of the Federal Reserve's financial strategies.

data.description: 1. Sky Treasury SDEV holds $156 million in Sky; 2. The Trump Meme team transferred $23.18 million in Trump to the BitGo custodial wallet; 3. Iran seeks to impose tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz; 4. A compromise proposal for the Crypto Market Structure Bill sparks industry division, with Coinbase expressing dissatisfaction with stablecoin yield terms; 5. A whale withdrew 11,999 ETH, worth $26 million; 6. Base's design director announced joining the X platform as head of design; 7. A wallet suspected of being related to Bitmine received 50,000 ETH, worth $108 million, from FalconX; 8. Circle froze the USDC balances of 16 hot wallets, involving multiple businesses; 9.
